general.title: Nearest Neighbor Calculation [SPAC][DMAP]
general.instructions:
Computes the shortest distance from each cell to the nearest cell of each phenotype. The distance table is stored with the key name "Label". \
Please refer to DUET Documentation, GitHub Documentation for further information.

categories.name: Advanced Analysis Setting parameters
categories.help_text: Parameters for Advanced Analysis Setting parameters

parameters.name: ImageID
parameters.description: If multiple images are in the dataset, specify the annotation with image IDs. Otherwise, use "None" to treat the dataset as a single image.

parameters.name: Nearest Neighbor Associated Table
parameters.description: Key name to store the calculated distances. Default is "spatial_distance".

parameters.name: Verbose
parameters.description: Indicates whether to print progress messages.
